<> to replace a specific url with another in a string in php you can use the str_replace function which works for all occurrences of the string here is an example ```php $string = 'new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $old_url = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new_url = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $updated_string = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $updated_string; ``` this will replace every instance of the old url with the new one in the string a palindrome is a word or phrase that reads the same backward as forward like madam or racecar
